items.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.dek: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.body: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We fear for our lives' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
items.dek: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.
items.body: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Equatorial Guinea government resigns after failing to meet targets
items.dek: The vice-president says the government had barely reached 10% of its targets, without specifying them.
items.body: The vice-president says the government had barely reached 10% of its targets, without specifying them.
items.author: IriLine Desk
